title: The Black Cat Plot Tightens Around Kaya
description: On pages 14–16, the Syrup Village story develops through Usopp, Kaya, Kuro, Jango, and the Straw Hats as the danger behind the village’s peaceful surface becomes clearer.
scene: This scene follows the tension around Usopp’s village: lies, loyalty, hidden plans, and the growing clash with the Black Cat Pirates.

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: You don't suppose they slept in?

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: I can hear "go!" coming from the north direction...

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: There's another entrance into the village in the north... but...

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Don't tell me you got it wrong!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: They talked about the plan here... so I thought they'd attack from this side!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Hurry! Which way are they going to attack the village from?

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Going in that direction it'll only take 3 minutes!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: The landscape on that side is Basi- Cally the same as this one! All we have to do is prevent them from coming on top of the slope!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Oh no! That's where we docked our ships!!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: My treasure is going to be robbed!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: I only need 20 seconds to get there!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Damn! Then our oil trap and prepara- Tions are useless!

summary: The part advances the Syrup Village arc by tying Usopp’s reputation and Kaya’s safety to the threat posed by Kuro and his crew.
